description_long: This object consists of a set of four pillows arranged on a soft, rumpled bed with a thick comforter. The pillows are rectangular and appear plush, with visible creases and folds that suggest a soft, fabric exterior. The comforter is draped loosely over the bed, with some areas bunched up and others lying flat, creating a casual, lived-in appearance. The color palette is a light, neutral tone, primarily off-white or pale gray, giving the bedding a clean and modern look. The surface of the pillows and comforter appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or embellishments. There are no visible tags, logos, or labels on any of the pillows or bedding.
description: A set of four soft, rectangular pillows arranged on a rumpled, light-colored bed with a thick comforter. The bedding appears plush, smooth, and clean, with a modern, neutral aesthetic.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the pillows and comforter from a low, side angle, highlighting the plushness and the way the bedding drapes over the edge.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a top-down perspective, emphasizing the arrangement of the pillows and the folds in the comforter.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the bedding from the opposite side, showing the full width of the bed and the alignment of the pillows.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a view from the foot of the bed, focusing on the length of the comforter and the layering of the pillows.
